overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game depicting a hooded protagonist navigating a medieval Middle Eastern city with sandstone architecture and palm trees. The character walks from open streets through narrow alleys and market areas, accompanied initially by a companion before continuing alone through bustling pedestrian zones.

scene_state.functional_zone: open palm-lined street with central fountain

events.description: passes by soldiers in red robes standing near the fountain area
mounted rider on horse passes by on the right side of the street
companion stops to interact with a pedestrian while protagonist continues forward

agents.ego_description: walking alongside a companion in green robes through a sunlit street lined with palm trees and sandstone buildings

notable_agents.action: companion in green robes walking alongside the protagonist
mounted rider on horseback moving through the street

entered.detail: thick palm tree trunk with textured bark leaning slightly over the street
tan-colored mud brick building with small windows and wooden doors
multi-story historic building with decorative wooden balconies
rectangular water feature surrounded by stone walls and vegetation
circular tower with a dome roof visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The protagonist walks with a companion through a sunlit street lined with tall palm trees and sandstone buildings. They pass by a central fountain area where soldiers stand guard, and a mounted rider passes by on the right before the companion stops to interact with a pedestrian.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow residential alley with high walls

events.description: turns left into a narrow alleyway leaving the main street
encounters a donkey standing in a small courtyard area

agents.ego_description: leaves the companion behind and turns into a narrow alleyway, continuing alone through enclosed passages

notable_agents.action: donkey standing still in the courtyard facing the protagonist

entered.detail: high sandstone wall casting shadows on the narrow path
smooth mud brick wall with small arched windows
set of stone steps leading up to a higher level on the left side
brown donkey standing in a small sunlit courtyard

segments.scene_description: After leaving the companion behind, the protagonist turns left into a narrow alleyway with high sandstone walls. The space becomes more enclosed and shaded, leading to a small courtyard where a donkey stands near the path.

events.description: passes through a large decorative stone archway into a wider street
passes by a group of NPCs standing and conversing near a building entrance

agents.ego_description: walking through a large archway and continuing down a street with other pedestrians and architectural landmarks

notable_agents.action: group of men in traditional robes standing and conversing near a doorway

entered.detail: monumental pointed arch with intricate brick patterns spanning the street
building with a prominent dome and arched windows visible above the rooftops
projecting wooden balcony with lattice screens on the upper floor of a building

segments.scene_description: The protagonist emerges from the narrow alley and passes through a large decorative stone archway into a wider sunlit street. The area features prominent domed structures and wooden balconies, with pedestrians walking in various directions and a group of men conversing near a building entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market alley with hanging fabrics

events.description: passes a large wooden cart and market stalls lining the right side
passes under green and blue fabric canopies that shade the street

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow market alley, passing stalls and pedestrians under hanging fabric canopies

notable_agents.action: woman and child walking ahead in the same direction toward the market

entered.detail: large wooden wagon with big wheels parked on the side of the street
green fabric awning stretched across the street providing shade
blue fabric awning overlapping with the green canopy overhead
row of stone arches forming a covered walkway on the left side
wooden stall structure with goods displayed on the right side

segments.scene_description: The protagonist enters a narrow market alley shaded by hanging green and blue fabric canopies. A large wooden cart sits on the right side near market stalls, while an arched colonnade runs along the left. The street leads toward a more open plaza area visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a medieval city, transitioning from wide, sunlit avenues into enclosed alleyways and vibrant market districts. It begins with the protagonist and a companion walking past tall palm trees and sandstone buildings, passing a guarded fountain and a mounted rider before the companion stops to speak with a pedestrian. As the protagonist continues alone, the scene shifts into a narrow, shaded alleyway with high walls that leads through a small courtyard where a donkey stands. The camera then follows the character through a decorative stone archway, emerging back into the bright sunlight of a wider street characterized by domed structures, wooden balconies, and groups of conversing pedestrians. Finally, the path narrows once more as the protagonist enters a market alley shaded by green and blue fabric canopies, passing a large wooden cart and a colonnade before heading toward a distant open plaza.
